prompt_inputs.restrictions: exclude: onion, garlic, leek, shallot, broccoli, cabbage, cauliflower, brussels sprouts, beans, lentils, chickpeas, peas, wheat bread, pasta, rye bread, barley, milk, yogurt, soft cheese, apples, pears, mango, watermelon, dried fruit, mushrooms, asparagus, artichoke, sweet corn, carbonated drinks, sorbitol, mannitol, xylitol, honey, agave syrup, high-fructose corn syrup, peaches, plums, cherries, apricots, nectarines, persimmons, cashews, pistachios, processed meat, fried foods, spicy sauces, beer, chewing gum, protein bars

solution_criteria: The plan covers exactly 1 day and explicitly mentions the luteal phase.
No excluded ingredients are present anywhere in the plan.
The day has exactly 3 meals and 1 snack.
All recipes realistically take under 20 minutes to prepare.
Evening meals are formulated to be anti-bloating/easy to digest.
The daily caloric total falls within a realistic range of 1500-1650 kcal.
